description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular design with a flat and low-pitched gable roof, and a symmetrical facade. The exterior is clad in light-colored brick with large, white-framed windows arranged in even rows, providing ample natural light. The front entryway is centrally located, accessed by a short walkway, and is flanked by two columns and a circular decorative element above the door. The property is surrounded by a white fence and includes a spacious green lawn in both the front and back yards. On one side of the house, there is a rectangular swimming pool adjacent to a patio area, visible from the rear and side views. The house also features a garage with a driveway leading up to it, emphasizing its suburban residential character.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat and gable roof, large symmetrical windows, a central entryway, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central entryway with columns, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and partial view of the backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large windows, and the swimming pool adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio area, and the side of the house with additional lawn space.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, flanked by columns, and a circular decorative element above the door
